children.text: Stewardship guides our path, Treasury secures our future, Citizenry creates our value

children.layout: mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl gap-16 sm:gap-y-24 grid lg:grid-cols-2 lg:items-center

children.text: Our core leadership team—the Turtles—guides Lotusia with unwavering commitment t...
Question everything—including ourselves—to keep truth at the center
Take responsibility for our words, actions, and their outcomes
Lead with patience and understanding toward the common good
Fix what's broken instead of accepting the status quo
"I like to burn electricity for Lotus because I like to burn Lotus."
"Don't hoard tokens; hoard and foster human relationships. Lotus is a multi-generational project."

children.layout: mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl gap-16 sm:gap-y-24 grid lg:grid-cols-2 lg:items-center

children.text: Every person who gives or receives Lotus is part of our citizenry—the heart of o...
Anyone can become a citizen—no barriers, no gatekeepers
Generosity and authentic connections are what make Lotusia possible
We grow together by learning from each other and building understanding

children.layout: mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl gap-16 sm:gap-y-24 grid lg:grid-cols-2 lg:items-center

children.text: Our global network of miners secures the Lotus network and creates new currency....
Miners run computers that maintain the Lotus network and keep all transactions secure
Electricity is converted into new Lotus through secure cryptographic processes
Miners signal their support for Stewardship decisions, creating alignment across the ecosystem
Half of all new Lotus goes directly to Stewardship for community development
